title: Bedrock Skin Packs
description: Adds support for downloading Bedrock Edition Skin Packs, for use with the Bedrock Skins mod.
body:
# Bedrock Skin Packs

Bedrock Skin Packs is a resource pack made for the [Bedrock Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-skins) mod that adds the ability to download and use Bedrock Edition/Legacy Console Edition skins packs. 

Skin packs can be downloaded directly from the change skin screen without ever having to leave the game.

<details>
<summary>Skin Packs</summary>
  
- 1st Birthday Skin Pack
- 2nd Birthday Skin Pack
- 3rd Birthday Skin Pack
- 4th Birthday Skin Pack
- 5th Birthday Skin Pack
- Adventure Time
- Battle & Beasts 2
- Battle & Beasts
- Biome Settlers Pack 1

- The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim

- Halo

- Minecon 2015 Skin Pack
- MINECON 2016 Skin Pack
- MINECON Earth 2017
- Mini Game Heroes
- Mini Game Masters
- Moana Character Pack
- Mass Effect

- Norse Mythology

</details>
